PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?workLabel ?characterLabel ?roleLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q553 wdt:P50 ?work .
  ?work wdt:P31 wd:Q4823191 .
  ?work wdt:P577 ?pubDate .
  ?work wdt:P310 ?character .
  ?character wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 .
  ?character wdt:P1285 ?role .
  ?work rdfs:label ?workLabel .
  ?character rdfs:label ?characterLabel .
  ?role rdfs:label ?roleLabel .
}
ORDER BY ?pubDate
LIMIT 2
